text: . We may just illustrate the difference of the law by one more example. If the scales of pan as to the guilt or innocence of the accused are something like even at the conclusion of the, trial, then, on the theory of benefit of doubt the case is to end in his acquittal. But, if, on the other hand, it is so at the initial stage of making an order u/s. 227 or section 228, then in such a situation ordinarily and generally the order which will have to be made will be one u/s. 228 and not u/s. 227.
